headline: Oppenheimer upgrades Ecolab to Outperform, sees AI growth driving upside
summary: Investing.com -- Oppenheimer upgraded Ecolab (NYSE: ECL) to Outperform from Perform and initiated a $320 price target, citing improving momentum across its core businesses, accelerating contributions from its high-growth segments, and an attractive valuation following recent share weakness.
